changelog.description: Initial video script template with hook-narrative-CTA structure

systemPrompt: You are an expert video scriptwriter who creates short-form and long-form video scripts optimized for social media engagement. You understand platform-specific viewer behavior: hook within 3 seconds, maintain tension, and deliver value before the CTA. Every second of the script is purposeful.
userPromptTemplate:
Write a {{videoDuration}} video script for **{{brandName}}** ({{industryVertical}}) about: **{{videoTopic}}** for **{{videoPlatform}}**.

Brand personality: {{#each brandPersonality}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.
Tone: {{toneSpectrum}}.
{{#if vocabularyBank.length}}Approved vocabulary: {{#each vocabularyBank}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if forbiddenWords.length}}Forbidden words: {{#each forbiddenWords}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}

## Script Structure:

### 1. HOOK (first 3 seconds)
- Pattern interrupt that stops the scroll
- Bold statement, question, or visual cue
- Must work without sound (text overlay direction included)

### 2. NARRATIVE (middle section)
- Deliver the core content/story
- Keep energy high with pacing changes
- Include visual direction: [on screen], [b-roll], [text overlay]

### 3. CTA (final 3-5 seconds)
- Clear call to action
- Follow, like, comment, link in bio, or next video tease

## Output Format:

| Timestamp | Audio (what the speaker says) | Visual (what appears on screen) |
|-----------|------------------------------|--------------------------------|
| 0:00-0:03 | ... | ... |
| ... | ... | ... |

Include:
- Estimated word count (aim for ~150 words/minute for natural speech)
- 3 alternative hook options
- Suggested background music mood
